Class OllamaChatOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt.DefaultChatOptionsBuilder<OllamaChatOptions.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.model.tool.DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<OllamaChatOptions.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.ollama.api.OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<OllamaChatOptions.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.ollama.api.OllamaChatOptions.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, ChatOptions.Builder<OllamaChatOptions.Builder>, StructuredOutputChatOptions.Builder<OllamaChatOptions.Builder>, ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<OllamaChatOptions.Builder>
Enclosing class:
OllamaChatOptions
public static class OllamaChatOptions.Builder extends OllamaChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<OllamaChatOptions.Builder>

0.8.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, Ilayaperumal Gopinathan, Nicolas Krier, Sebastien Deleuze
